title: 1981-04-16_Pat_74.txt
raw_text: the "mass" that is the BIP? A sort of registering of the omnipresence of the Empire, like a siesmograph? Opposed to this (General Felix Buckman) is Jason Taverner, who is Dionysos - i.e. Zagreus/Christ - the God of change pitted against King Penthus? I can, then, identify Valis as Christ by way of identifying its adversary, the Roman Empire. Perhaps King Felix vs the BIP is eros vs thanatos per se, life vs death! This would point, then, once more to the Dialectic as basic & irreducible - & internal (as well as vis-à-vis Valis' environment). Its real enemy is its own internal ossification, the BIP. All this (this issue of entropy) is carefully & consciously studied in "Ubik" & "Maze" both! & in "Ubik" three is a strange trivialization of what is in fact holy information, as if it spontaneously manifested itself in the trash strata, undergoing a transformation from sacred to profane; it & (at the beginning of each chapter) it is recombinant. It is as if self-causing. Info must occur at all loci throughout the system so as to be in contain the message that sums up the totality (macro-micro corresponddence): that is, the total message can be retrieved by what I call a key-lock. Thus for me the "disinhibiting stimulus" of the golden fish sign caused me to retrieve the total corpus of information - intrinsic & latent in me - that (1) constitutes the Christ strain & (2) shows up in "Tears" as Acts K 371 Hence "anamnesis." The battle between "Christ" & "Satan" can be seen as the battle by a vast unitary biological organism (which we are in) to overcome inertia & entropy in order to live, grow & evolve; "Satan" is the obdurate, recalcitrant, unchanging mass that hangs back & in fact reverts (as in "Ubik") to simpler, more stable forms, to less intelligence, less consciousness, less flexibility, less complexity, less organization, less order, less diversification, to the slower, the unchanging, the uniform, the durable - in short ossification (hence seen as metal & a constant wit fixed ubiquitous patterned ways). (It is the same throughout; i.e. it moves always toward sameness & equilibrium. In terms of information it effaces information & reduces it to repetition & monotony. Thus the Empire of 2000 years ago is the same as the Empire now.) It is not eternal forms that we wish, but swifter & swifter reticulation & arborizing of the phylogons through the accretions that time (i.e. change, the flux world) supplies; this is a dynamic entity, not a static one; it is an evolving biological organism existing in terms of real change toward complexification; these changes are irreversible & their rate exponentially accellerates & can best be expressed as recombinant messages. What I call "meta-morphemes." Complexity is inversely proportional to frequency of ocurrence & statistical probability; the limit is a unitary unique infinitely complex totality the probability of which approaches zero as a limit, yet it does occur. K372 Since this entity has an environment that it is devouring (transubstantiating, absorbing negative entropy from, subsuming into arrangements of information) it cannot be synonymous with reality, but exists "camouflaged" in reality (Teilhard to the contrary!) (Viz: this is not creation evolving, for it requires a less complex - i.e. less ordered - environment from which it can absorbe negative entropy, & this in fact is precisely what I saw; & of course this entity is camouflaged - normally - but can be discriminated as "set" to "ground" (under the ideal circumstances of the percipient possessing temporal parallaxis, because it is more complex & hence "set" as if in the future vis-à-vis its environment (since everything evolves from - no, not everything. It evolves from the simple to the complex; its environment does not. Nonetheless it will be perceptible as "set" if the percipient can discern degrees of order/complexity/ structure. If this entity did not exist - & did not dwell in an environment less complex than it - there would be no "set to ground" to discriminate. Hence discriminating "set to ground" is in fact simply seeing it - as if it is no longer camouflaged. It is what I call distributed, it is not at this place versus that place. K373 It is not "here" versus "there" but is wherever its level of greater order (complexity) exists. & this is especially true when info intensifies - viz: where there is a dense concentration of info. In a sense, then, Valis arises spontaneously. Concentrations of complexity give rise to it as much as [it can be said that] it gives rise to concentrations of complexity. Thus it is self-causing & related always to what I call accelleration of change rate velocity. Valis is that which is more complex & which changes more rapidly; it may represent a superventive phenomenon, a thresholding, in which it suddenly occurs saying "Anokhi--" (that is, it becomes self-aware; this may explain Valis' mind in mind as a superventive event, rather than enthousiasmos by something adventitious, that is, it was a sort of birth, not an invasion; I became Valis in the sense of a superventive event - thresholding - occurring; this would be Ditheon (1) & it would see its external analog because an inner-outer unified field is the case. (1) Two conscious human selves - bilateral hemispheric parity - thresholding into one superventive Ditheon mind: Valis (the "adventitious" psyche is the latent, recessive, appositional psyche reaching consciousness due to it performing the "meta-abstraction" which K374 I identify with the unconscous rational judging thinking function performing a judgment (belatedly): that is, by saying "X is true" it itself becomes - must become - conscious, thus a second or "adventitious" self, which when "wedded" to the conscious dominant self produces a "hierogamy" resulting in Ditheon which is Valis. This is more an apotheosis than enthusiasmos. The two components are human (my type A & type B psyches). THe rational judgment by the unconscious thinking function in a certain real sense overrules the conscious irrational intuitive function, which deals onl with possibilities & has no conception of what is meant by "it is the case." i.e. "it is true." To the conscious irrational intuitive function this cancels the force of absolute revelation over & above any & all speculations however imaginative: it is a new, added dimension entirely, & as a meta-abstraction acts as a catalyst that revolutionizes the total psyche. But a localized instance of Ditheon is aware of the cosmic organism of which it is so-to-speak an occurrance. of these are indeed like cells of a brain, which points once again to the complexity of this organism; it is to metazoon as a metazoon is to a protozoon. By perceiving the cosmic organism it shares in its life, because each is aware of the other & partici- K375 pate in a kind of father & adopted son & coheir relationship; that is, if you become Ditheon this is not the full story; the full story is your perception of the cosmic organism & your being drawn to it as if by inner affinity; you are isomorphic, you & it. It subsumes you in its advancing network of incorporation, arrangement & subsumation. Its "story" is your "story." But also you know of it, & its relationship to complexification & change rate velocity accelleration, & how it incorporates (transubstantiates) its environment. What I seem to be saying is that if your own inner change rate velocity accellerates sufficiently you with threshold into a supervenient locus of the Ditheon & by doing so become aware of what I construe to be a widely-distributed Ditheon (not to be confused with reality as such but expressing itself as a perturbation of the reality field). I think "Ditheon" refers specifically to Christ. After all, the crucial initial "meta-abstraction" (judging & hence coming into consciousness by the rational thinking function) consists of a realization that Christ is the case; thus that which is later seen - Valis - & which one becomes - Valis - is that which is intially understood to exist. Awareness of the reality of Christ/Valis/Ditheon is both the cause & the goal in result of this process. It begins when it ends: it is initially seen & finally seen, too. K376 It would seem very likely that the macro Ditheon instigates - initiates - your awareness of it (which involves your own evolution to the supervenient Ditheon evolutionary stage). Thus you cannot perceive it unless so-to-speak invited; the keys are in its possession, & unless it raises you to its level, you are shut out; & it remains camouflaged, "although as near to you as your neck vein." -- Nothing can be understood about self & reality if the change rate veloicty accelleration axis is not understood, in which a now- conscious macro-organism incroproates & subsumes its environment into arrangements of information, thus becoming muc more complex, more organized, freer, more conscious, more flexible, larger - & all these qualitative transformations arise from purely quantitative increments in its change rate velocity axis. Its order (organization) is expressed by an info- metabolism in which all combinations of linking & relinking are tried out (with progressively more possible combinations - what I call "meta- morphemes"). It perturbs al the reality field, being itself structure per se, not substantive - not any one thing but a way of combining things into structure, it is the structure (arrangement) not the things arranged; thus it can be anything if that thing is arranged (ordered, structured) with a sufficient degree of complexity (in contradistinction to its environment). Thus it "is" a way by which an observer-participant sees reality; the observer-participant is essential; Valis exists only when perceived. K377 It is an extension of consciousness into the reality field as perturbation (ordering) of that field. Valis is brought into existence by the act of being perceived, yet it is objectively real; what is perceived is not plural discrete things but a perturbed unified field. Valis is a linkup between a certain high state of consciousness by a self & that which the self experiences &, in experiencing it, perceives a certain level of organization (order) & in doing so confers that order as unifying pattern onto what had been plural discrete objects. The order is both in the eye of the beholder & also in reality; the beholder is necessary for that order of complexity - structure - to exist. This is a thresholding phenomenon in which an observer is a ncecessary ingredient given his state of what I call "Ditheon" consciousness ("Anokhi--") he becomes involuntary cosmocrator in this sense: he forms reality out of his own prior thoughts which act as an information basis of reality. Thus he both perceives & makes reality, but is aware only of doing the former. The more intently he perceives reality the more "substantial" it becomes. He is now in it rather than outside it - that is, he & it are inseparable. Its structure evolves due to our act of perceiving it, but our act of perceiving it is due to an incremental leap in our perception over which we have no control but is in itself a part of the "it" perceived; thus that which is perceived causes us to perceive it & so is itself its own cause - in a loop through us as percipient-participant the meta- abstraction is by the percipient & yet paradoxically actually by that which is perceived. K378 Acting in not on the percipient it is as if that which is perceived is in the percipient, so perceiption of it is a form of self-awareness. What we are dealing with is a unified field involving percipient & thing perceived: the thing perceived acts within the percipient so that he is no longer outside the thing perceived. Thus the thing perceived perceives itself via the percipient. This is a loop. A causeless event occurs, a supervenient thresholding phenomenon, that takes the form of what
